context: Evaluates whether the tool call persistence module correctly saves and retrieves ToolCallRecord arrays from per-message JSON files, and implements the 30-day cleanup policy. This module supports the dev_toolcalls command which shows developers what tools the AI invoked for a given message.

checklist.name: saveToolCall creates/appends
checklist.description: `saveToolCall` creates the file with a single-element array if it does not exist, or reads the existing array and appends the new record before writing back.

checklist.name: File path convention
checklist.description: Files are stored at `data/tool_calls/{messageId}.json` and the directory is created if it does not exist.

checklist.name: getToolCalls behavior
checklist.description: `getToolCalls` returns the parsed array from the file, or `[]` (empty array) when the file does not exist — without throwing an error.

checklist.name: 30-day cleanup
checklist.description: `cleanup()` removes files whose records are older than 30 days by checking the `timestamp` field and comparing to the current date.

checklist.name: Record schema
checklist.description: Saved records preserve all fields from the ToolCallRecord interface: `toolName`, `input`, `output`/`error`, `step`, `timestamp`, and `executionTime`.
